subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! I have consigned my affairs unto Thee and have committed the reins of all matters into the grasp of Thy Will and Thy right hand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا الهی فوضت امری الیک و اودعت زمام الامور کلها فی قبضه مشیتک و یمین
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @prayer for forgiveness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
